member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel
member.summary: Represents a builder class to be generated with its capabilities. Internal type replacing BuilderModel - used only within the generator.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator
member.summary: Generates a TypeScript SDK using the ATS (Aspire Type System) capability-based API. Produces typed builder classes with fluent methods that use invokeCapability().

remarks.para: The generator maps ATS types to TypeScript types according to the following rules:

Handle Types: Type IDs use the format {AssemblyName}/{TypeName}.
ATS Type ID TypeScript Type
Aspire.Hosting/IDistributedApplicationBuilderBuilderHandle
Aspire.Hosting/DistributedApplicationApplicationHandle
Aspire.Hosting/DistributedApplicationExecutionContextExecutionContextHandle
Aspire.Hosting.Redis/RedisResourceRedisResourceBuilderHandle
Aspire.Hosting/ContainerResourceContainerResourceBuilderHandle
Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel/IResourceIResourceHandle

item.description: Interface types: Use interface name + "Handle" (keep the I prefix)
Aspire.Hosting.Redis/RedisResource → RedisResourceBuilder class with RedisResourceBuilderPromise thenable wrapper
Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel/IResource → ResourceBuilderBase abstract class (interface types get "BuilderBase" suffix)
Concrete builders extend interface builders based on type hierarchy
Derived from capability ID: Aspire.Hosting.Redis/addRedis → addRedis
TypeScript uses camelCase (the canonical form from capability IDs)

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.IsHandleType(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Checks if an AtsTypeRef represents a handle type.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapTypeRefToTypeScript(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Maps an AtsTypeRef to a TypeScript type using category-based dispatch. This is the preferred method - uses type metadata rather than string parsing.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapPrimitiveType(System.String)
member.summary: Maps primitive type IDs to TypeScript types.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapEnumType(System.String)
member.summary: Maps an enum type ID to the generated TypeScript enum name. Throws if the enum type wasn't collected during scanning.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapUnionTypeToTypeScript(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Maps a union type to TypeScript union syntax (T1 | T2 | ...).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetWrapperOrHandleName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the wrapper class name or handle type name for a handle type ID. Prefers wrapper class if one exists, otherwise generates a handle type name.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetDtoInterfaceName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a TypeScript interface name for a DTO type.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapInputTypeToTypeScript(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Maps a user-supplied input type to TypeScript. For interface handle types, generated APIs accept wrapper instances. For cancellation tokens, generated APIs accept either an AbortSignal or a transport-safe CancellationToken.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.MapParameterToTypeScript(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo)
member.summary: Maps a parameter to its TypeScript type, handling callbacks specially.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.IsInterfaceHandleType(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Checks if a type reference is an interface handle type. Interface handles need union types to accept wrapper classes.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetReturnTypeId(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Gets the TypeId from a capability's return type.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetTypeScriptMethodName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a valid TypeScript method name from a capability method name. Handles dotted names like "EnvironmentContext.resource" by extracting just the final part.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateAspireSdk(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsContext)
member.summary: Generates the aspire.ts SDK file with capability-based API.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateEnumTypes(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsEnumTypeInfo})
member.summary: Generates TypeScript enums from discovered enum types.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateDtoInterfaces(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsDtoTypeInfo})
member.summary: Generates TypeScript interfaces for DTO types marked with [AspireDto].

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.ToCamelCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a PascalCase name to camelCase.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.ToPascalCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a camelCase name to PascalCase.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetOptionsInterfaceName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the options interface name for a method. Strips any type prefix (e.g., "TypeName.methodName" -> "MethodName").

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.ResolveOptionsInterfaceName(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Gets the options interface name for a specific capability, accounting for type conflicts. Falls back to the default method-name-based interface if no specific mapping exists.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.SeparateParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo})
member.summary: Separates parameters into required and optional lists. Required = not optional and not nullable.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.RegisterOptionsInterface(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo})
member.summary: Registers an options interface to be generated later. Uses method name to create the interface name. When methods share a name but have incompatible callback parameter types, separate options interfaces are created with numeric suffixes (e.g., RunAsEmulatorOptions, RunAsEmulator1Options).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.AreOptionsCompatible(System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo},System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo})
member.summary: Checks whether two sets of optional parameters are compatible for sharing an options interface. Parameters with the same name must have the same type (including callback parameter types).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.AreParameterTypesEqual(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo)
member.summary: Checks whether two parameter infos have the same type (including callback types).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateOptionsInterfaces
member.summary: Generates all collected options interfaces.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateArgsObjectWithConditionals(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo},System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo})
member.summary: Generates an args object with conditional inclusion of optional parameters.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateCallbackBody(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsParameterInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCallbackParameterInfo})
member.summary: Generates the body of a callback function.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateHandleWrapperRegistrations(System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel},System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel})
member.summary: Generates handle wrapper registrations for all type classes and builder classes. This allows callback handles to be wrapped as typed instances.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateTypeClass(Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel)
member.summary: Generates a type class (context type or wrapper type). Uses property-like object pattern for exposed properties. For types with methods, also generates a Promise wrapper class for fluent chaining.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GroupPropertiesByName(System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo},System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo})
member.summary: Groups getters and setters by property name.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.ExtractPropertyName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the property name from a method name like "ClassName.propertyName" or "setPropertyName".

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GeneratePropertyLikeObject(System.String,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a property-like object with get and/or set methods. For dictionary types, generates a direct AspireDict field instead.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateWrapperPropertyObject(System.String,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a property-like object that returns a wrapper class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.IsDictionaryType(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Checks if a type reference is a dictionary type.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.IsListType(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Checks if a type reference is a list type.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateDictionaryProperty(System.String,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a direct AspireDict property for dictionary types.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateListProperty(System.String,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a direct AspireList property for list types.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateContextMethod(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a context instance method (from ExposeMethods=true).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateWrapperMethod(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a method on a wrapper class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateTypeClassMethod(Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel,Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo)
member.summary: Generates a method on a type class using the thenable pattern. Generates both an internal async method and a public fluent method.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GenerateTypeClassThenableWrapper(Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel,System.Collections.Generic.List{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo})
member.summary: Generates a thenable wrapper class for a type class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.CreateBuilderModels(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo})
member.summary: Groups capabilities by ExpandedTargetTypes to create builder models. Uses expansion to map interface targets to their concrete implementations. Also creates builders for interface types (for use as return type wrappers).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.CollectAllReferencedTypes(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo})
member.summary: Collects all type refs referenced in capabilities (return types, parameter types, callback types, etc.) Returns a dictionary mapping typeId to AtsTypeRef for use in builder creation.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetEntryPointCapabilities(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsCapabilityInfo})
member.summary: Gets entry point capabilities (those without TargetTypeId).

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.DeriveClassName(System.String)
member.summary: Derives the class name from an ATS type ID. For interfaces like IResource, strips the leading 'I'.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetHandleTypeName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the handle type alias name for a type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.ExtractSimpleTypeName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the simple type name from a type ID.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.HasChainableMethods(Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.BuilderModel)
member.summary: Determines if a type has chainable methods and should have a Promise wrapper. Types with instance methods or wrapper methods get Promise wrappers.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.AtsTypeScriptCodeGenerator.GetPromiseWrapperForReturnType(Aspire.TypeSystem.AtsTypeRef)
member.summary: Gets the Promise wrapper class name for a return type, if one exists. Returns null if the return type doesn't have a Promise wrapper.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.TypeScriptLanguageSupport
member.summary: Provides language support for TypeScript AppHosts. Implements scaffolding, detection, and runtime configuration.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.TypeScriptLanguageSupport.LanguageId
member.summary: The language/runtime identifier for TypeScript with Node.js. Format: {language}/{runtime} to support multiple runtimes (e.g., typescript/bun, typescript/deno).

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.TypeScriptLanguageSupport.CodeGenTarget
member.summary: The code generation target language. This maps to the ICodeGenerator.Language property.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.CodeGeneration.TypeScript.TypeScriptLanguageSupport.AppHostTsConfigContent
member.summary: The default content for tsconfig.apphost.json, shared between scaffolding and migration.

member.name: T:Aspire.Shared.NpmVersionHelper
member.summary: Helpers for parsing and comparing npm-style version ranges.

member.name: M:Aspire.Shared.NpmVersionHelper.ShouldUpgrade(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the existing dependency version should be upgraded to the desired version. Returns true when both versions are parseable and the desired version is newer.

member.name: M:Aspire.Shared.NpmVersionHelper.TryParseNpmVersion(System.String,Semver.SemVersion@)
member.summary: Attempts to extract a comparable from an npm version range string. Strips range operators (^, ~, >=, <=, >, <, =) and parses the remaining version. Returns false for union ranges (||), workspace references, file paths, and symlinks.
